name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit up to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with in-store and online applications at Memphis-area locations.
description_long:
Speedy Cash operates physical retail locations across the Memphis, Tennessee area, including the Summer Avenue store featured here. The company positions itself as a neighborhood lender offering short-term lending solutions for consumers needing quick access to cash. With multiple store locations in Memphis and Bartlett, they maintain extended hours to serve working customers.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans up to $425 with repayment due around the next payday, Lines of Credit up to $4,000 allowing flexible draws up to an approved limit with repayment over time, and Title Loans up to $4,000 secured by vehicle collateral. All three products can be applied for in-store or online. Beyond lending, Speedy Cash provides ancillary financial services including money orders, wire transfers, check cashing, and Green Dot Visa debit cards. The Memphis Summer Avenue location operates Monday-Friday with extended evening hours and Saturday service.

Speceedy Cash emphasizes transparency and customer service throughout the application process. They provide detailed information about loan terms before applicants sign agreements, offer in-person guidance through the application, and maintain bilingual customer service (English and Spanish). The company allows applicants to ask questions during the signing process and afterwards regarding funding or repayment. They require standard documentation including government ID, proof of income/employment, phone number, email, and address verification for all loan types.

As a traditional storefront lender, Speedy Cash serves consumers needing immediate cash but typically charges rates and terms substantially higher than banks or credit unions. The maximum payday loan amount of $425 limits utility for larger emergencies, and title loans create vehicle repossession risk. Consumers should carefully review the cost of borrowing before applying, as short-term lending products carry significant financial implications.
pros: Multiple loan products available (payday, line of credit, title loans) allowing borrowers to choose based on their specific situation
Extended hours including evening service (until 7pm Monday and Friday) and Saturday availability accommodate working schedules
Transparent pricing model where borrowers know exact costs before signing loan agreements
In-store application support with team members available to answer questions throughout the process
Flexible Line of Credit up to $4,000 allows draws as needed, with credit limit replenishing as principal is paid down
Bilingual customer service available (English: 1-888-333-1360 and Spanish: 1-855-734-0111)
Additional financial services (check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, Green Dot cards) in-store
cons: Payday loans capped at $425 may be insufficient for many emergency expenses, requiring alternative products or multiple loans
Title loans create risk of vehicle repossession if borrower cannot repay, potentially eliminating transportation access
As a short-term lender, rates and fees are substantially higher than traditional banks or credit unions, making these expensive options
Requires in-store visit for initial application of title loans (vehicle appraisal needed), limiting convenience despite online options
No disclosure of APR, fees, or total cost of borrowing on the website, preventing transparent cost comparison before visiting
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$425 quickly for urgent bills or expenses before next paycheck
Borrowers with vehicle collateral seeking larger loans ($1,000-$4,000) than payday products offer
Self-employed or gig workers with variable income unable to document consistent employment
Customers in Memphis area without bank access seeking check cashing or money order services alongside lending
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for Memphis-area consumers facing immediate cash shortages who can repay within weeks or have vehicle collateral for larger amounts. The critical caveat is that short-term lending products carry substantial costs compared to traditional credit sources; borrowers should only use these services when no other options exist and understand the full financial commitment before applying.
services: Customer service in English and Spanish
